title: dryopteris tenera
intro: Dryopteris tenera, also known as the lady fern or tender lady fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Asia, characterized by its delicate fronds and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are said to include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dryopteris tenera can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to support overall health and well-being.
